text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity in these scenes. The first image, with its wide, open expanse and subdued colors, evokes a feeling of potential—as though I am about to witness (or perhaps participate in) something about to unfold. In the second, the vibrant visuals and digital displays ignite my sense of wonder and intellectual excitement. Here, knowledge and creativity seem to coalesce, inviting me to reflect on humanity’s relationship with technology. Both spaces, in their emptiness and readiness, make me feel contemplative and a bit eager to discover what comes next.
